title: Transformer Block Components
content:
# Transformer Block Components

## 1. Pre-LN vs Post-LN
*   **Post-LN:** $\mathbf{x}_{l+1} = \text{LN}(\mathbf{x}_l + \text{SubLayer}(\mathbf{x}_l))$
*   **Pre-LN:** $\mathbf{x}_{l+1} = \mathbf{x}_l + \text{SubLayer}(\text{LN}(\mathbf{x}_l))$

## 2. RoPE Rotation Matrix
$$\mathbf{R}_{m\theta} = \begin{bmatrix} \cos m\theta & -\sin m\theta \\ \sin m\theta & \cos m\theta \end{bmatrix}$$
*   Encodes relative distance properties directly during the attention dot product calculation.
